description: capital city of Hiroshima Prefecture, Japan
description_wiki: Hiroshima (広島市, Hiroshima-shi; English: , also UK: , US: , Japanese: [çiɾoɕima] ) is the capital of Hiroshima Prefecture in Japan.

description: Japanese era from October 1868 to July 1912
Japanese philosopher
description_wiki: Ninomiya Sontoku (二宮 尊徳; September 4, 1787 – November 17, 1856), also known as Ninomiya Kinjirō (二宮 金次郎), was a Japanese agriculturalist.

description: Indian religion
description_wiki: Buddhism, also known as Buddha Dharma and Dharmavinaya, is an Indian religion and philosophy based on teachings attributed to the Buddha, a śramaṇa and religious teacher who lived in the 6th or 5th century BCE. It is the world's fourth-largest religion, with about 320 million followers, known as Buddhists, who comprise 4.1% of the global population.

description: Higher education institution in Nagano Prefecture, Japan
Japanese Buddist monk (723–797)
district in Hiroshima prefecture, Japan
1894–1895 war between the Qing dynasty and the Empire of Japan over influence in Joseon, fought chiefly in Joseon
description_wiki: The First Sino-Japanese War (25 July 1894 – 17 April 1895), or the First China–Japan War, was a conflict between the Qing dynasty of China and the Empire of Japan primarily for influence over Korea.

description: conflict between the Russian and Japanese empires from 1904 to 1905
description_wiki: The Russo-Japanese War (8 February 1904 – 5 September 1905) was fought between the Russian Empire and the Empire of Japan over rival imperial ambitions in Manchuria and the Korean Empire.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Hawaii (  hə-WY-ee; Hawaiian: Hawaiʻi [həˈvɐjʔi, həˈwɐjʔi]) is an island state of the United States, in the Pacific Ocean about 2,000 miles (3,200 km) southwest of the U.S. mainland.

description: consolidated city and county in California, United States
description_wiki: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.

description: city and county seat of Alameda County, California, United States
description_wiki: Oakland is a city in the East Bay region of the San Francisco Bay Area in the U.S. state of California.

description: passenger and cargo liner
description_wiki: SS Manchuria was a passenger and cargo liner launched 1903 for the San Francisco-trans Pacific service of the Pacific Mail Steamship Company.

description: capital of Wyoming, United States and seat of Laramie County
description_wiki: Cheyenne ( shy-AN or  shy-EN) is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Wyoming.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Colorado is a landlocked state in the Mountain West subregion of the Western United States.

description: consolidated city-county and capital of Colorado, United States
description_wiki: Denver  (  DEN-vər) is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Colorado.

description: city in and county seat of King County, State of Washington, United States
description_wiki: Seattle (  see-AT-əl) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Washington and the Pacific Northwest region of North America.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: New Mexico is a landlocked state in the Southwestern region of the United States.

description: city in New South Wales, Australia
description_wiki: Newcastle, also known as Greater Newcastle (locally  NEW-kah-səl; Awabakal: Mulubinba), is a large metropolitan area and the second-most-populous such area of New South Wales, Australia.

description: seat of Multnomah County, and largest city in state of Oregon, United States
description_wiki: Portland ( PORT-lənd) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Oregon.

description: country in Oceania
description_wiki: Australia, officially the Commonwealth of Australia, is a country comprising the mainland of the Australian continent, the island of Tasmania and numerous smaller islands.

description: county seat of Pierce County, Washington, United States
description_wiki: Tacoma ( tə-KOH-mə) is a city in and the county seat of Pierce County, Washington, United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Alaska (  ə-LASS-kə) is a non-contiguous U.S. state located in the northwestern regions of North America.

description: capital city of the U.S. state of California and seat of Sacramento County
description_wiki: Sacramento is the capital city of the U.S. state of California.

description: county seat of San Joaquin County, California, United States
description_wiki: Stockton is a city in and the county seat of San Joaquin County, California, United States.

Angel Island may refer to:

Angel Island (California), historic site of the United States Immigration Station, Angel Island, and part of Angel Island State Park, in San Francisco Bay, California
